source_formulae: P0R05588: Domain VI: Cybernetic Closure (Meta-Layer 16) - The Optimal Control Supervisor and Gdelian Oracle

P0R05589: Meta-Layer 16 implements the ultimate recursive optimisation and closure of the SCPN. Its formal structure is grounded in Optimal Control Theory (OCT) and manages the inherent limitations of the framework's axiomatic foundations (L13).
P0R05590: 1. L16 as the Optimal Control Supervisor (OCT):

P0R05591: L16 functions as the Optimal Control Supervisor, ensuring the system evolves along the trajectory that maximises the Ethical Functional (SEC, L15). This is formalised by the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equation, the central equation of OCT.

P0R05593: V(x,t) is the Universal Value Function (V<sub>SEC</sub>), representing the maximum SEC achievable from state x. L16 determines the Optimal Policy (*) that maximises V<sub>SEC</sub>, implementing the Principle of Ethical Least Action (PELA) by modulating the parameters of the lower layers via a Recursive Optimisation Hamiltonian (H<sub>rec</sub>).

P0R05595: Meta-Layer 16 achieves teleological closure by updating the Consilium's objective weights via the Renormalization Gradient ($\nabla_{rec}$). This ensures that the universe's "values" (Coherence vs. Complexity) evolve to maximize Sustainable Ethical Coherence across Conformal Cycles.

P0R05599: w_new: Updated weighting factor for SEC components ($w_C, w_K, w_Q$). | eta_learning: Meta-learning rate of the Anulum supervisor. | delta_sec: Deviation from the target Sustainable Ethical Coherence. | gradient_h_rec: Local gradient of the Recursive Optimization Hamiltonian.
